message:
bd-3v0j.2: Session branching UI — branch picker and navigator

Add visual branch picker modal (Ctrl+B), branch cycling (Ctrl+Left/Right),
and branch indicator in the header showing current branch position.

Features:
- Branch indicator "Branch N/M" in header when session has multiple leaves
- BranchPickerOverlay modal with up/down/Enter/Esc navigation
- Ctrl+Left/Right to cycle between sibling branches without opening picker
- Session.sibling_branches() walks tree to find nearest fork point
- SiblingBranch struct with preview text and message count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
